name: Kraken
minorleague_affiliate: Coachella Valley Firebirds, Kansas City Mavericks

injuries.comment: The Kraken said on Wednesday (Sept. 17) that Montour had a bursa removed from his ankle earlier in September and will be out for two weeks.
The Kraken said on Thursday (Sept. 18) that Villeneuve has a lower-body injury as of Thursday and is awaiting further evaluation. It's unclear if he will be able to begin the season on time.
The Kraken said on Wednesday (Sept. 18) that McCormick is out indefinitely due to a hip injury and will not participate in training camp.
The Kraken said on Thursday (Sept. 18) that Roed is expected to be out for approximately two months.
